meaning: (variant of 真相[zhen1 xiang4]) the truth about sth; the actual facts
sentence: 大家都想知道这件事的真象。
pinyin: Dà jiā dōu xiǎng zhī dào zhè jiàn shì de zhēn xiàng.
english: Everyone wants to know the truth about what happened.

sentence: 当地人把那座山当作神山来敬拜。
pinyin: Dāng dì rén bǎ nà zuò shān dāng zuò shén shān lái jìng bài.
english: The local people worship that mountain as a sacred mountain.

sentence: 历史课上讲到了当年的反动派如何被推翻的。
pinyin: Lì shǐ kè shàng jiǎng dào le dāng nián de fǎn dòng pài rú hé bèi tuī fān de.
english: The history class covered how the reactionaries of that era were overthrown.

sentence: 他在社交媒体上发了一组图，展示这次旅行。
pinyin: Tā zài shè jiāo méi tǐ shàng fā le yī zǔ tú, zhǎn shì zhè cì lǚ xíng.
english: He posted a set of pictures on social media showing this trip.

meaning: non-ferrous metals (all metals excluding iron, chromium, manganese and
sentence: 铜和铝都属于有色金属。
pinyin: Tóng hé lǚ dōu shǔ yú yǒu sè jīn shǔ.
english: Copper and aluminum are both non-ferrous metals.
